reasoning: The rules implement strict default-deny, role-based access control (RBAC) with a hardcoded admin email, and comprehensive data validation for the sermons collection. Public read access is limited to published sermons, while all write operations require admin privileges. Data types, string lengths, and enum values are strictly enforced.

vulnerabilities.details: The users collection is protected such that users can only read their own data, and only admins can create or update user roles. No PII is exposed to unauthorized users.
User roles can only be set by existing admins. The default admin is hardcoded to a verified email address, preventing initial escalation.
All string fields in the sermons collection have size limits enforced (e.g., manuscript < 100,000 chars, blog < 50,000 chars), preventing DoS attacks via large payloads.
